using System;
using System.Net.Http;
using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using Zernio.Client;
using Zernio.Model;

namespace Zernio.Api;

public class AnalyticsApi : IDisposable, IAnalyticsApi, IAnalyticsApiSync, IApiAccessor, IAnalyticsApiAsync
{
	private ExceptionFactory _exceptionFactory = (string name, IApiResponse response) => (Exception)null;

	public ApiClient ApiClient { get; set; }

	public IAsynchronousClient AsynchronousClient { get; set; }

	public ISynchronousClient Client { get; set; }

	public IReadableConfiguration Configuration { get; set; }

	public ExceptionFactory ExceptionFactory
	{
		get
		{
			if (_exceptionFactory != null && _exceptionFactory.GetInvocationList().Length > 1)
			{
				throw new InvalidOperationException("Multicast delegate for ExceptionFactory is unsupported.");
			}
			return _exceptionFactory;
		}
		set
		{
			_exceptionFactory = value;
		}
	}

	public AnalyticsApi()
		: this((string)null)
	{
	}

	public AnalyticsApi(string basePath)
	{
		Configuration = Zernio.Client.Configuration.MergeConfigurations(GlobalConfiguration.Instance, new Configuration
		{
			BasePath = basePath
		});
		ApiClient = new ApiClient(Configuration.BasePath);
		Client = ApiClient;
		AsynchronousClient = ApiClient;
		ExceptionFactory = Zernio.Client.Configuration.DefaultExceptionFactory;
	}

	public AnalyticsApi(Configuration configuration)
	{
		if (configuration == null)
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("configuration");
		}
		Configuration = Zernio.Client.Configuration.MergeConfigurations(GlobalConfiguration.Instance, configuration);
		ApiClient = new ApiClient(Configuration.BasePath);
		Client = ApiClient;
		AsynchronousClient = ApiClient;
		ExceptionFactory = Zernio.Client.Configuration.DefaultExceptionFactory;
	}

	public AnalyticsApi(HttpClient client, HttpClientHandler handler = null)
		: this(client, (string)null, handler)
	{
	}

	public AnalyticsApi(HttpClient client, string basePath, HttpClientHandler handler = null)
	{
		if (client == null)
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("client");
		}
		Configuration = Zernio.Client.Configuration.MergeConfigurations(GlobalConfiguration.Instance, new Configuration
		{
			BasePath = basePath
		});
		ApiClient = new ApiClient(client, Configuration.BasePath, handler);
		Client = ApiClient;
		AsynchronousClient = ApiClient;
		ExceptionFactory = Zernio.Client.Configuration.DefaultExceptionFactory;
	}

	public AnalyticsApi(HttpClient client, Configuration configuration, HttpClientHandler handler = null)
	{
		if (configuration == null)
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("configuration");
		}
		if (client == null)
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("client");
		}
		Configuration = Zernio.Client.Configuration.MergeConfigurations(GlobalConfiguration.Instance, configuration);
		ApiClient = new ApiClient(client, Configuration.BasePath, handler);
		Client = ApiClient;
		AsynchronousClient = ApiClient;
		ExceptionFactory = Zernio.Client.Configuration.DefaultExceptionFactory;
	}

	public AnalyticsApi(ISynchronousClient client, IAsynchronousClient asyncClient, IReadableConfiguration configuration)
	{
		if (client == null)
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("client");
		}
		if (asyncClient == null)
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("asyncClient");
		}
		if (configuration == null)
		{
			throw new ArgumentNullException("configuration");
		}
		Client = client;
		AsynchronousClient = asyncClient;
		Configuration = configuration;
		ExceptionFactory = Zernio.Client.Configuration.DefaultExceptionFactory;
	}

	public void Dispose()
	{
		ApiClient?.Dispose();
	}

	public string GetBasePath()
	{
		return Configuration.BasePath;
	}

	public GetAnalytics200Response GetAnalytics(string? postId = null, string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null, DateOnly? fromDate = null, DateOnly? toDate = null, int? limit = null, int? page = null, string? sortBy = null, string? order = null)
	{
		return GetAnalyticsWithHttpInfo(postId, platform, profileId, accountId, source, fromDate, toDate, limit, page, sortBy, order).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<GetAnalytics200Response> GetAnalyticsWithHttpInfo(string? postId = null, string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null, DateOnly? fromDate = null, DateOnly? toDate = null, int? limit = null, int? page = null, string? sortBy = null, string? order = null)
	{
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		if (postId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "postId", postId));
		}
		if (platform != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "platform", platform));
		}
		if (profileId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "profileId", profileId));
		}
		if (accountId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		}
		if (source != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "source", source));
		}
		if (fromDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "fromDate", fromDate));
		}
		if (toDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "toDate", toDate));
		}
		if (limit.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "limit", limit));
		}
		if (page.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "page", page));
		}
		if (sortBy != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "sortBy", sortBy));
		}
		if (order != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "order", order));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<GetAnalytics200Response> apiResponse = Client.Get<GetAnalytics200Response>("/v1/analytics", requestOptions, Configuration);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetAnalytics", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public async Task<GetAnalytics200Response> GetAnalyticsAsync(string? postId = null, string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null, DateOnly? fromDate = null, DateOnly? toDate = null, int? limit = null, int? page = null, string? sortBy = null, string? order = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		return (await GetAnalyticsWithHttpInfoAsync(postId, platform, profileId, accountId, source, fromDate, toDate, limit, page, sortBy, order, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false)).Data;
	}

	public async Task<ApiResponse<GetAnalytics200Response>> GetAnalyticsWithHttpInfoAsync(string? postId = null, string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null, DateOnly? fromDate = null, DateOnly? toDate = null, int? limit = null, int? page = null, string? sortBy = null, string? order = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		if (postId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "postId", postId));
		}
		if (platform != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "platform", platform));
		}
		if (profileId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "profileId", profileId));
		}
		if (accountId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		}
		if (source != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "source", source));
		}
		if (fromDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "fromDate", fromDate));
		}
		if (toDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "toDate", toDate));
		}
		if (limit.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "limit", limit));
		}
		if (page.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "page", page));
		}
		if (sortBy != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "sortBy", sortBy));
		}
		if (order != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "order", order));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<GetAnalytics200Response> apiResponse = await AsynchronousClient.GetAsync<GetAnalytics200Response>("/v1/analytics", requestOptions, Configuration, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetAnalytics", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public GetBestTimeToPost200Response GetBestTimeToPost(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null)
	{
		return GetBestTimeToPostWithHttpInfo(platform, profileId, accountId, source).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<GetBestTimeToPost200Response> GetBestTimeToPostWithHttpInfo(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null)
	{
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		if (platform != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "platform", platform));
		}
		if (profileId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "profileId", profileId));
		}
		if (accountId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		}
		if (source != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "source", source));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<GetBestTimeToPost200Response> apiResponse = Client.Get<GetBestTimeToPost200Response>("/v1/analytics/best-time", requestOptions, Configuration);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetBestTimeToPost", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public async Task<GetBestTimeToPost200Response> GetBestTimeToPostAsync(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		return (await GetBestTimeToPostWithHttpInfoAsync(platform, profileId, accountId, source, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false)).Data;
	}

	public async Task<ApiResponse<GetBestTimeToPost200Response>> GetBestTimeToPostWithHttpInfoAsync(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		if (platform != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "platform", platform));
		}
		if (profileId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "profileId", profileId));
		}
		if (accountId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		}
		if (source != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "source", source));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<GetBestTimeToPost200Response> apiResponse = await AsynchronousClient.GetAsync<GetBestTimeToPost200Response>("/v1/analytics/best-time", requestOptions, Configuration, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false);

		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetBestTimeToPost", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public GetContentDecay200Response GetContentDecay(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null)
	{
		return GetContentDecayWithHttpInfo(platform, profileId, accountId, source).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<GetContentDecay200Response> GetContentDecayWithHttpInfo(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null)
	{
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		if (platform != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "platform", platform));
		}
		if (profileId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "profileId", profileId));
		}
		if (accountId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		}
		if (source != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "source", source));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<GetContentDecay200Response> apiResponse = Client.Get<GetContentDecay200Response>("/v1/analytics/content-decay", requestOptions, Configuration);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetContentDecay", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public async Task<GetContentDecay200Response> GetContentDecayAsync(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		return (await GetContentDecayWithHttpInfoAsync(platform, profileId, accountId, source, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false)).Data;
	}

	public async Task<ApiResponse<GetContentDecay200Response>> GetContentDecayWithHttpInfoAsync(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		if (platform != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "platform", platform));
		}
		if (profileId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "profileId", profileId));
		}
		if (accountId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		}
		if (source != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "source", source));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<GetContentDecay200Response> apiResponse = await AsynchronousClient.GetAsync<GetContentDecay200Response>("/v1/analytics/content-decay", requestOptions, Configuration, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetContentDecay", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public GetDailyMetrics200Response GetDailyMetrics(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, DateTime? fromDate = null, DateTime? toDate = null, string? source = null)
	{
		return GetDailyMetricsWithHttpInfo(platform, profileId, accountId, fromDate, toDate, source).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<GetDailyMetrics200Response> GetDailyMetricsWithHttpInfo(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, DateTime? fromDate = null, DateTime? toDate = null, string? source = null)
	{
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		if (platform != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "platform", platform));
		}
		if (profileId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "profileId", profileId));
		}
		if (accountId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		}
		if (fromDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "fromDate", fromDate));
		}
		if (toDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "toDate", toDate));
		}
		if (source != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "source", source));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<GetDailyMetrics200Response> apiResponse = Client.Get<GetDailyMetrics200Response>("/v1/analytics/daily-metrics", requestOptions, Configuration);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetDailyMetrics", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public async Task<GetDailyMetrics200Response> GetDailyMetricsAsync(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, DateTime? fromDate = null, DateTime? toDate = null, string? source = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		return (await GetDailyMetricsWithHttpInfoAsync(platform, profileId, accountId, fromDate, toDate, source, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false)).Data;
	}

	public async Task<ApiResponse<GetDailyMetrics200Response>> GetDailyMetricsWithHttpInfoAsync(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, DateTime? fromDate = null, DateTime? toDate = null, string? source = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		if (platform != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "platform", platform));
		}
		if (profileId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "profileId", profileId));
		}
		if (accountId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		}
		if (fromDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "fromDate", fromDate));
		}
		if (toDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "toDate", toDate));
		}
		if (source != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "source", source));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<GetDailyMetrics200Response> apiResponse = await AsynchronousClient.GetAsync<GetDailyMetrics200Response>("/v1/analytics/daily-metrics", requestOptions, Configuration, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetDailyMetrics", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public InstagramAccountInsightsResponse GetFacebookPageInsights(string accountId, string? metrics = null, DateOnly? since = null, DateOnly? until = null, string? metricType = null)
	{
		return GetFacebookPageInsightsWithHttpInfo(accountId, metrics, since, until, metricType).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse> GetFacebookPageInsightsWithHttpInfo(string accountId, string? metrics = null, DateOnly? since = null, DateOnly? until = null, string? metricType = null)
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetFacebookPageInsights");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		if (metrics != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metrics", metrics));
		}
		if (since.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "since", since));
		}
		if (until.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "until", until));
		}
		if (metricType != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metricType", metricType));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse> apiResponse = Client.Get<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse>("/v1/analytics/facebook/page-insights", requestOptions, Configuration);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetFacebookPageInsights", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public async Task<ApiResponse<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse>> GetFacebookPageInsightsWithHttpInfoAsync(string accountId, string? metrics = null, DateOnly? since = null, DateOnly? until = null, string? metricType = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))

		if (accountId == null)

			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetFacebookPageInsights");
		}

		}

		}

		}

		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metricType", metricType));
		}

	}

	public ApiResponse<GetFollowerStats200Response> GetFollowerStatsWithHttpInfo(string? accountIds = null, string? profileId = null, DateOnly? fromDate = null, DateOnly? toDate = null, string? granularity = null)
	{
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		if (accountIds != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountIds", accountIds));
		}
		if (profileId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "profileId", profileId));
		}
		if (fromDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "fromDate", fromDate));
		}
		if (toDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "toDate", toDate));
		}
		if (granularity != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "granularity", granularity));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}

	}

	public ApiResponse<GetGoogleBusinessPerformance200Response> GetGoogleBusinessPerformanceWithHttpInfo(string accountId, string? metrics = null, DateOnly? startDate = null, DateOnly? endDate = null)
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetGoogleBusinessPerformance");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };

		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		if (metrics != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metrics", metrics));
		}

		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "startDate", startDate));
		}
		if (endDate.HasValue)

			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "endDate", endDate));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{

		}

	{

	}

	public ApiResponse<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse> GetInstagramAccountInsightsWithHttpInfo(string accountId, string? metrics = null, DateOnly? since = null, DateOnly? until = null, string? metricType = null, string? breakdown = null)
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetInstagramAccountInsights");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));

		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metrics", metrics));
		}

		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "since", since));
		}

		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "until", until));
		}

		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metricType", metricType));
		}
		if (breakdown != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "breakdown", breakdown));
		}

	public InstagramDemographicsResponse GetInstagramDemographics(string accountId, string? metric = null, string? breakdown = null, string? timeframe = null)
	{
		return GetInstagramDemographicsWithHttpInfo(accountId, metric, breakdown, timeframe).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<InstagramDemographicsResponse> GetInstagramDemographicsWithHttpInfo(string accountId, string? metric = null, string? breakdown = null, string? timeframe = null)
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetInstagramDemographics");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		if (metric != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metric", metric));
		}
		if (breakdown != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "breakdown", breakdown));
		}
		if (timeframe != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "timeframe", timeframe));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<InstagramDemographicsResponse> apiResponse = Client.Get<InstagramDemographicsResponse>("/v1/analytics/instagram/demographics", requestOptions, Configuration);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetInstagramDemographics", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public async Task<InstagramDemographicsResponse> GetInstagramDemographicsAsync(string accountId, string? metric = null, string? breakdown = null, string? timeframe = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		return (await GetInstagramDemographicsWithHttpInfoAsync(accountId, metric, breakdown, timeframe, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false)).Data;

	public async Task<ApiResponse<InstagramDemographicsResponse>> GetInstagramDemographicsWithHttpInfoAsync(string accountId, string? metric = null, string? breakdown = null, string? timeframe = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetInstagramDemographics");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)

		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)

			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));

			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metric", metric));
		}

		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "breakdown", breakdown));
		}
		if (timeframe != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "timeframe", timeframe));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}

		}

	{
		return GetInstagramFollowerHistoryWithHttpInfo(accountId, metrics, since, until, metricType).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse> GetInstagramFollowerHistoryWithHttpInfo(string accountId, string? metrics = null, DateOnly? since = null, DateOnly? until = null, string? metricType = null)
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetInstagramFollowerHistory");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		if (metrics != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metrics", metrics));
		}
		if (since.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "since", since));
		}
		if (until.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "until", until));
		}
		if (metricType != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metricType", metricType));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))

			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}

			if (ex != null)

				throw ex;
			}
		}

	public ApiResponse<GetLinkedInAggregateAnalytics200Response> GetLinkedInAggregateAnalyticsWithHttpInfo(string accountId, string? aggregation = null, DateOnly? startDate = null, DateOnly? endDate = null, string? metrics = null)

			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetLinkedInAggregateAnalytics");
		}

		}

	}

	public ApiResponse<GetLinkedInPostAnalytics200Response> GetLinkedInPostAnalyticsWithHttpInfo(string accountId, string urn)
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetLinkedInPostAnalytics");
		}

		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'urn' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetLinkedInPostAnalytics");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();

		{

		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);

		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.PathParameters.Add("accountId", ClientUtils.ParameterToString(accountId));
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "urn", urn));

			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}

	}

	public ApiResponse<GetLinkedInPostReactions200Response> GetLinkedInPostReactionsWithHttpInfo(string accountId, string urn, int? limit = null, string? cursor = null)
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetLinkedInPostReactions");
		}
		if (urn == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'urn' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetLinkedInPostReactions");
		}

		{

		}

	public async Task<ApiResponse<GetLinkedInPostReactions200Response>> GetLinkedInPostReactionsWithHttpInfoAsync(string accountId, string urn, int? limit = null, string? cursor = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetLinkedInPostReactions");
		}
		if (urn == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'urn' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetLinkedInPostReactions");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.PathParameters.Add("accountId", ClientUtils.ParameterToString(accountId));
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "urn", urn));
		if (limit.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "limit", limit));
		}
		if (cursor != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "cursor", cursor));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<GetLinkedInPostReactions200Response> apiResponse = await AsynchronousClient.GetAsync<GetLinkedInPostReactions200Response>("/v1/accounts/{accountId}/linkedin-post-reactions", requestOptions, Configuration, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetLinkedInPostReactions", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public GetPostTimeline200Response GetPostTimeline(string postId, DateTime? fromDate = null, DateTime? toDate = null)
	{
		return GetPostTimelineWithHttpInfo(postId, fromDate, toDate).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<GetPostTimeline200Response> GetPostTimelineWithHttpInfo(string postId, DateTime? fromDate = null, DateTime? toDate = null)
	{
		if (postId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'postId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetPostTimeline");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "postId", postId));
		if (fromDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "fromDate", fromDate));
		}
		if (toDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "toDate", toDate));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}

	{
		return (await GetPostTimelineWithHttpInfoAsync(postId, fromDate, toDate, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false)).Data;
	}

	public async Task<ApiResponse<GetPostTimeline200Response>> GetPostTimelineWithHttpInfoAsync(string postId, DateTime? fromDate = null, DateTime? toDate = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		if (postId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'postId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetPostTimeline");
		}

		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "postId", postId));
		if (fromDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "fromDate", fromDate));
		}
		if (toDate.HasValue)
		{

		}

		}

			if (ex != null)

				throw ex;
			}
		}

	}

	public GetPostingFrequency200Response GetPostingFrequency(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null)
	{
		return GetPostingFrequencyWithHttpInfo(platform, profileId, accountId, source).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<GetPostingFrequency200Response> GetPostingFrequencyWithHttpInfo(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null)
	{
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		if (platform != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "platform", platform));
		}
		if (profileId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "profileId", profileId));
		}
		if (accountId != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		}
		if (source != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "source", source));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<GetPostingFrequency200Response> apiResponse = Client.Get<GetPostingFrequency200Response>("/v1/analytics/posting-frequency", requestOptions, Configuration);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetPostingFrequency", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public async Task<ApiResponse<GetPostingFrequency200Response>> GetPostingFrequencyWithHttpInfoAsync(string? platform = null, string? profileId = null, string? accountId = null, string? source = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];

		}

		}

			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "profileId", profileId));
		}
		if (accountId != null)

		}

			}
		}

	public InstagramAccountInsightsResponse GetTikTokAccountInsights(string accountId, string? metrics = null, DateOnly? since = null, DateOnly? until = null, string? metricType = null)
	{
		return GetTikTokAccountInsightsWithHttpInfo(accountId, metrics, since, until, metricType).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse> GetTikTokAccountInsightsWithHttpInfo(string accountId, string? metrics = null, DateOnly? since = null, DateOnly? until = null, string? metricType = null)
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetTikTokAccountInsights");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		if (metrics != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metrics", metrics));
		}
		if (since.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "since", since));
		}
		if (until.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "until", until));
		}
		if (metricType != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metricType", metricType));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse> apiResponse = Client.Get<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse>("/v1/analytics/tiktok/account-insights", requestOptions, Configuration);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetTikTokAccountInsights", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	{

	public async Task<ApiResponse<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse>> GetTikTokAccountInsightsWithHttpInfoAsync(string accountId, string? metrics = null, DateOnly? since = null, DateOnly? until = null, string? metricType = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetTikTokAccountInsights");
		}

		}

		{

		}
		if (until.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "until", until));
		}
		if (metricType != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metricType", metricType));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}

	public InstagramAccountInsightsResponse GetYouTubeChannelInsights(string accountId, string? metrics = null, DateOnly? since = null, DateOnly? until = null, string? metricType = null)
	{
		return GetYouTubeChannelInsightsWithHttpInfo(accountId, metrics, since, until, metricType).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse> GetYouTubeChannelInsightsWithHttpInfo(string accountId, string? metrics = null, DateOnly? since = null, DateOnly? until = null, string? metricType = null)
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetYouTubeChannelInsights");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		if (metrics != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metrics", metrics));
		}
		if (since.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "since", since));
		}
		if (until.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "until", until));
		}
		if (metricType != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "metricType", metricType));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse> apiResponse = Client.Get<InstagramAccountInsightsResponse>("/v1/analytics/youtube/channel-insights", requestOptions, Configuration);

		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetYouTubeChannelInsights", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

		}

	public YouTubeDailyViewsResponse GetYouTubeDailyViews(string videoId, string accountId, DateOnly? startDate = null, DateOnly? endDate = null)
	{
		return GetYouTubeDailyViewsWithHttpInfo(videoId, accountId, startDate, endDate).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<YouTubeDailyViewsResponse> GetYouTubeDailyViewsWithHttpInfo(string videoId, string accountId, DateOnly? startDate = null, DateOnly? endDate = null)
	{
		if (videoId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'videoId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetYouTubeDailyViews");
		}
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetYouTubeDailyViews");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "videoId", videoId));
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		if (startDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "startDate", startDate));
		}
		if (endDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "endDate", endDate));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<YouTubeDailyViewsResponse> apiResponse = Client.Get<YouTubeDailyViewsResponse>("/v1/analytics/youtube/daily-views", requestOptions, Configuration);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetYouTubeDailyViews", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public async Task<YouTubeDailyViewsResponse> GetYouTubeDailyViewsAsync(string videoId, string accountId, DateOnly? startDate = null, DateOnly? endDate = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		return (await GetYouTubeDailyViewsWithHttpInfoAsync(videoId, accountId, startDate, endDate, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false)).Data;
	}

	public async Task<ApiResponse<YouTubeDailyViewsResponse>> GetYouTubeDailyViewsWithHttpInfoAsync(string videoId, string accountId, DateOnly? startDate = null, DateOnly? endDate = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		if (videoId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'videoId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetYouTubeDailyViews");
		}
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetYouTubeDailyViews");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "videoId", videoId));
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		if (startDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "startDate", startDate));
		}
		if (endDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "endDate", endDate));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<YouTubeDailyViewsResponse> apiResponse = await AsynchronousClient.GetAsync<YouTubeDailyViewsResponse>("/v1/analytics/youtube/daily-views", requestOptions, Configuration, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetYouTubeDailyViews", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public YouTubeDemographicsResponse GetYouTubeDemographics(string accountId, string? breakdown = null, DateOnly? startDate = null, DateOnly? endDate = null)
	{
		return GetYouTubeDemographicsWithHttpInfo(accountId, breakdown, startDate, endDate).Data;
	}

	public ApiResponse<YouTubeDemographicsResponse> GetYouTubeDemographicsWithHttpInfo(string accountId, string? breakdown = null, DateOnly? startDate = null, DateOnly? endDate = null)
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetYouTubeDemographics");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		if (breakdown != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "breakdown", breakdown));
		}
		if (startDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "startDate", startDate));
		}
		if (endDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "endDate", endDate));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<YouTubeDemographicsResponse> apiResponse = Client.Get<YouTubeDemographicsResponse>("/v1/analytics/youtube/demographics", requestOptions, Configuration);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetYouTubeDemographics", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}

	public async Task<YouTubeDemographicsResponse> GetYouTubeDemographicsAsync(string accountId, string? breakdown = null, DateOnly? startDate = null, DateOnly? endDate = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		return (await GetYouTubeDemographicsWithHttpInfoAsync(accountId, breakdown, startDate, endDate, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false)).Data;
	}

	public async Task<ApiResponse<YouTubeDemographicsResponse>> GetYouTubeDemographicsWithHttpInfoAsync(string accountId, string? breakdown = null, DateOnly? startDate = null, DateOnly? endDate = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default(CancellationToken))
	{
		if (accountId == null)
		{
			throw new ApiException(400, "Missing required parameter 'accountId' when calling AnalyticsApi->GetYouTubeDemographics");
		}
		RequestOptions requestOptions = new RequestOptions();
		string[] contentTypes = new string[0];
		string[] accepts = new string[1] { "application/json" };
		string text = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderContentType(contentTypes);
		if (text != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Content-Type", text);
		}
		string text2 = ClientUtils.SelectHeaderAccept(accepts);
		if (text2 != null)
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Accept", text2);
		}
		requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "accountId", accountId));
		if (breakdown != null)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "breakdown", breakdown));
		}
		if (startDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "startDate", startDate));
		}
		if (endDate.HasValue)
		{
			requestOptions.QueryParameters.Add(ClientUtils.ParameterToMultiMap("", "endDate", endDate));
		}
		if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(Configuration.AccessToken) && !requestOptions.HeaderParameters.ContainsKey("Authorization"))
		{
			requestOptions.HeaderParameters.Add("Authorization", "Bearer " + Configuration.AccessToken);
		}
		ApiResponse<YouTubeDemographicsResponse> apiResponse = await AsynchronousClient.GetAsync<YouTubeDemographicsResponse>("/v1/analytics/youtube/demographics", requestOptions, Configuration, cancellationToken).ConfigureAwait(continueOnCapturedContext: false);
		if (ExceptionFactory != null)
		{
			Exception ex = ExceptionFactory("GetYouTubeDemographics", apiResponse);
			if (ex != null)
			{
				throw ex;
			}
		}
		return apiResponse;
	}
}
